# Support

## Profile and automation questions

Use the repository's [issue chooser](https://github.com/Dev-Sahad/Dev-Sahad/issues/new/choose) for reproducible bugs and focused feature requests. Include the affected file, expected result, actual result, and relevant workflow run when applicable.

## Contribution help

Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [repository documentation](../docs/README.md) before opening a pull request.

## Security reports

Do not use public issues for vulnerabilities or sensitive reports. Follow [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) and contact the maintainer privately.
